title: blephistelma aurantia
intro: Blephistelma aurantia, also known as the orange milk bush, is a succulent plant belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its latex and leaves, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Blephistelma aurantia include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote healing.
